scope_definition: The inclusive Upriver placement scope includes explicit sponsorships, promotions, and brand-specific affiliate placements. Generic product affiliate links without evidence of a brand campaign are rejected.

overlaps.verification_summary: UrAvgConsumer had a monetized Ridge product placement, while MKBHD ran a Ridge promotion and Linus Tech Tips carried an explicit Ridge sponsorship.

target_evidence.video_title: Can MKBHD's Tech Setup Replace Mine?
target_evidence.public_evidence: The description links a Ridge Commuter Pro Backpack and three named Ridge accessories, under a generic affiliate disclosure.
target_evidence.verdict: Affiliate/product placement verified; direct paid sponsorship was not disclosed.

peer_evidence.video_title: WWDC 2026 Impressions: Yeah, That's About Right
peer_evidence.public_evidence: The description offers up to 40% off through ridge.com/MKBHD.

peer_evidence.video_title: This $5000 PC From Just Four Years Ago SUCKS
peer_evidence.public_evidence: The description says Ridge sponsored the video and links ridge.com/LTT.

overlaps.verification_summary: The old UrAvgConsumer placement was an explicit Dell sponsorship, but the recent Linus Tech Tips row was only a product affiliate link among reviewed products.

target_evidence.public_evidence: The description thanks Dell for sponsoring the video and uses #DellCollab.

peer_evidence.video_title: Was I Wrong About the Macbook Neo?
peer_evidence.public_evidence: The description contains a Dell 16 product link and a generic affiliate disclaimer, but no Dell campaign or sponsor disclosure.

overlaps.verification_summary: UrAvgConsumer disclosed an EcoFlow sponsorship; Linus Tech Tips recently ran an EcoFlow offer with a creator-specific code and tracked campaign URL.

target_evidence.video_title: The Travel Tech Everyone Should Own in 2025
target_evidence.public_evidence: The description thanks EcoFlow for sponsoring the video and the page declares a paid promotion.

peer_evidence.video_title: I Found Free Money in the Tech House
peer_evidence.public_evidence: The description promotes EcoFlow DELTA 3 Ultra with creator code 26EFOUTLT.

overlaps.verification_summary: UrAvgConsumer disclosed a Samsung partnership and paid promotion; Linus Tech Tips recently published a dedicated Samsung enterprise-laptop showcase.

target_evidence.public_evidence: The description uses #SamsungPartner and the page declares a paid promotion.

peer_evidence.video_title: I can securely erase this computer from anywhere!
peer_evidence.public_evidence: The video is a dedicated Galaxy Book6 Enterprise Edition showcase with direct Samsung links and promotional copy.

overlaps.verification_summary: Both channels carried brand-specific Ohsnap MCON product promotions, but neither public page explicitly disclosed paid sponsorship.

target_evidence.public_evidence: The description links two Ohsnap MCON products and labels an Ohsnap MCON chapter under a generic affiliate disclosure.

peer_evidence.video_title: My Wife Needs a New Laptop
peer_evidence.public_evidence: The description promotes an Ohsnap sale through a campaign link that resolves to the MCON controller.
